title: Smarties: Meltdown
short_description: A colourful action puzzle game starring the iconic Smarties brand, built around colour-matching and meltdown-stopping mayhem.
description: Smarties: Meltdown is a family-friendly action puzzle game themed around the iconic confectionery brand. Players must sort and match Smarties by colour to prevent a meltdown, working through a variety of increasingly hectic stages. Bright and accessible, the game was designed to appeal to younger audiences.
